name: Nexon Asia Pacific
message: Nexon is headquartered in Sydney, New South Wales. Nexon Asia Pacific is an end-to-end managed IT provider with services ranging from cloud, secure networks, unified communications, managed security, business solutions and digital workspace solutions.Download data: https://mega.nz/folder/Fbkx3TLA#7EO2Vib3l_TM9dVXSIwzIw
